preamble: The prothetic insertion of a voiced labiodental fricative /v/ (or glide /w/) at the beginning of a word, often before back vowels.

examples.note: Prothetic /v/ inserted before historical *o: proto-Slavic *oko → Belarusian voka. Same pattern: *ozer- (lake) → Belarusian vёска. East Slavic v-prothesis before front vowels.
